mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 5% over 3 months signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns as corporate earnings prospects weaken.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or unemployment declines without corresponding equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous acceleration in CPI inflation and stagnation in federal funds rate signals stagflationary pressures, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns as real rates decline and earnings growth prospects weaken.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where both CPIAUCSL exceeds 3% YoY and FEDFUNDS remains below 1%.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained contraction in industrial production signals weakening manufacturing activity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns as corporate earnings and economic growth expectations decline.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines > 1% MoM for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or INDPRO declines without corresponding equity losses.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in housing starts above 1.2 million units signals improved consumer confidence and demand, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns through stronger corporate revenue expectations.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or housing starts exceed 1.2M without equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 200k jobs signals robust labor market conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns through increased consumer spending and corporate profitability.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or payroll growth exceeds 200k without equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in real estate financing activity above $400B signals elevated consumer and business spending, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns through stronger economic growth.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or real estate financing exceeds $400B without equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly rebound in GDP growth above 3% signals improved economic momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns through stronger corporate earnings and investor confidence.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of instances where GDP growth exceeds 3% quarterly, or economic momentum fails to translate to equity gains.
